comments: Approved after verifying commit 8fd968e against the contract and review packet. git show --stat --name-status shows only three added files: src/mcp-server/src/worktree-manager.ts, tasks/v0.8.5-m2-worktree-manager/execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.8.5-m2-worktree-manager/result-review-packet.json. src/mcp-server/src/worktree-manager.ts exists and exports wrappers for git worktree add (createWorktree), git commit and push (commitAndPushWorktree), and git worktree remove (removeWorktree). The prior command-injection concern is addressed by using child_process.execFile via execFileAsync with argument arrays in runGitCommand, not shell-interpolated command strings. No modification occurred in src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, no MCP Filesystem Proxy implementation appears in this commit, and no workflow/dispatch or iteration-state semantics were modified.
